title: BI Analytics Lead
location: Hybrid — Dubai, UAE (3 days onsite; relocation required)

score.notes: Strong role fit: fintech BI lead maps to data-quality-program, reporting-turnaround, and warehouse-cost-cut; cohort work matches outreach-reallocation. Comp well above target. Visa scores mid: relocation requires sponsorship (per profile), but FinTrack sponsors and handles it — sponsorship stated, so confidence high. Remote scores low — 3 days onsite in Dubai conflicts with remote-first preference, though profile allows relocation for an exceptional onsite role. Weighted (0-100): 9*3+9*2+6*2+3*1.5+8*1.5 = 27+18+12+4.5+12 = 73.5 -> 74 (standard tier, 60-79).

next_action.action: Human review of staged resume, then decide on relocation
